claimText: The year 2025 is designated as the International Year of Glaciers' Preservation.
evidenceExcerpt: 2025 designated as the International Year of Glaciers' Preservation
examUse: Statement-based question on international environmental observances.
distractorHooks: Confusing with the International Year of Mountains or Millets

claimText: The Decade of Action for Cryospheric Sciences spans the period from 2025 to 2034.
evidenceExcerpt: Decade of Action for Cryospheric Sciences (2025–2034)
examUse: Statement-based question on global scientific decades of action.

claimText: ICE-CRUNCH is an Indo-Swiss collaborative study focusing on ice nucleating particles in the North-Western Himalayas.
evidenceExcerpt: ICE-CRUNCH: A collaborative study between scientists of India and Switzerland... on ice nucleating particles in the North-Western Himalayas.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching research initiatives with partner countries or regions.
distractorHooks: Collaborative study with Norway or France
Focuses on the Arctic or Antarctica instead of the Himalayas

claimText: India's first High-Altitude Climate Research Station is located in Nathatop, Jammu and Kashmir.
evidenceExcerpt: India’s first High-Altitude Climate Research Station: In Nathatop, Jammu and Kashmir for Climate research
examUse: Location-matching or statement-based question on India's climate infrastructure.
distractorHooks: Located in Himachal Pradesh or Sikkim
Second or third such station instead of the first

claimText: India's High-Altitude Climate Research Station in Nathatop is affiliated with the World Meteorological Organization's (WMO) Global Atmospheric Watch (GAW) Programme.
evidenceExcerpt: affiliated with the World Meteorological Organization’s (WMO) Global Atmospheric Watch (GAW) Programme.
examUse: Statement-based question on institutional affiliations of Indian research stations.
distractorHooks: Affiliated with the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP)
